summary.intent: Reduce evaluator prompt size (~170K chars/evaluator, 2.56M total across 17 evaluators) by excluding full SKILL.md file content from evaluator file blocks, and improve Anthropic prompt cache reuse by reordering prompt sections so shared content (file blocks + project context) appears before evaluator-specific content.
summary.outcome: All three changes implemented and committed as fb87f34: skill files filtered from evaluator file lists, prompt sections reordered for cache prefix sharing, and tests updated. All 1331 tests pass with lint and typecheck clean.

repo: Skills metadata already flows to evaluators via buildSkillsSection() in prompt-builder.ts (frontmatter name + description only) â€” full SKILL.md content was redundant in file blocks

Two separate skill file pipelines exist: findSkillFiles() in file-finder.ts (was adding to evaluator file list) vs skills-finder.ts (used for skills summary section with frontmatter extraction) â€” only the former was changed
findSkillFiles() call in findAgentsFiles() was entirely removable since skill files are now excluded; the skills-finder.ts pipeline is independent
Pre-commit hooks enforce tests + lint + typecheck on every commit
Repo had pre-existing dirty files (frontend/src/lib/error-messages.ts, src/shared/evaluation/engine.ts) unrelated to this task

code.finding: findAgentsFiles() â€” added filter to exclude files whose path contains .cursor/skills/, .claude/skills/, .agents/skills/, .github/skills/; also removed the now-unnecessary findSkillFiles() parallel call

buildPrompt() and buildMultiFilePrompt() â€” reordered from evaluatorTemplateâ†’contextâ†’outputâ†’filesâ†’json to fileBlocksâ†’contextâ†’evaluatorTemplateâ†’outputâ†’json to maximize shared cache prefix across evaluators
Integration test updated to assert skill files are excluded from findAgentsFiles(); two new tests added for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md colocated inside skill directories

workflow: When pre-existing dirty files exist, stage only the files modified in the current task rather than using git add -A
bun run test and bun run lint are the verification commands for this repo

friction: One expected test failure after implementing skill file filtering â€” the integration test for findAgentsFiles() needed updating to match the new exclusion behavior
Had to verify that removing findSkillFiles() from findAgentsFiles() was safe by grepping for all usages to confirm the skills-finder.ts pipeline was independent
open_items: Manual verification of actual prompt structure via prompts/debug/ directory was listed in the plan's verification checklist but not performed in the session
Cache hit rate improvement is theoretical â€” no measurement of actual cache reuse before/after the reordering was done
